info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' pAne pibati rakzAyAM pAti pAyati SozaRe ' (Slo. 5) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yattvA deva prapibanti tata ApyAyase punaH' (f॰10.85.5) pUrRaM pibanti ityarTaH praSabdaH pAnasya paryAptiM kArtsnyamAha
'fjuH paSyati yaH sarvaM cakzuzA prapibanniva' (BA॰u॰34.23) AtmAnaM darSanena pratyagratAM nayan ityarTaH
'prapitve ahnaH kuyavaM sahasrA' (f0 41612) prapitve prakrame
'Apitve naH prapitve tUyamAgahi' (f0 843)
'saM yajYesu pibaDvam' (f॰7.37.2) saha pibatetyarTaH
'yasmin vfkze supalASe devEH sampibate yamaH' (f॰10.135.2) ukto'rTaH
'ta uBaye devamanuzyAH pitaraH sampibanti' (Sa॰brA॰3.6.2.26)
'tava vA ime'ntevAsAH tvamevEBiH sampibasva' (E॰brA॰3.30)
'yatpibAmi sampibAmi samudra iva sampibaH' (aTarva॰6.135.2) Satrumeva saNgfhya tadIyaM rasaM pibAmItyAha
'yasminvfkze supalASe devEH sampibate yamaH' (ni0 12291) arTanirdeSAyeha punarupanyAsaH sampibate saMgacCata iti yAskaH
'akzaramakzarameva tad devatA anuprapibanti' (E0 brA0 237) anukrameRa pAtumAraBante anuprayorarTavatteha dfSyA Bavati
'ayaM mitrAya varuRAya SantamaH somo BUtvavapAnezu' (f0 11364) avanataM pAnamavapAnamiti sAyaRaH avanamya pAnamityarTaH
'asmintsu some'vapAnamastu te' (f0 10432)
'gOrAd vedIyA~ avapAnamindro viSvAhed yAti sutasomamicCan' (f0 7981) avapAnam=pAnasTAnaM palvalAdi
'fSyo na tfzyannavapAnamA gahi' (f0 8410)
'mApa sTAtaM mahizevAvapAnAt' (f0 101062) ukto'rTaH fSyo mfgaH
'fSyo na tfzyannavapAnamA gahi' (f0 8410) avapAnaM grahacamasAdipAtrezvavanItaM somam fSyapakze'vagAhya pIyate'tretyavapAnaM palavalAdi
'hiraRyAd GftaM nizpibati' (tE0 saM0 213118) udDftya pibatItyarTaH
'salile kzIramAsaktaM nizpibanniva sArasaH' (rA0 3198) nizkfzya pibannityarTaH
'mallAtmajanmanoH SokaH kopena nirapIyata' (rAja0 71497) spazwo'rTaH
'sa yaTA dftirnizpIta evaM saMlInaH SiSye' (Sa0 brA0 16316) yasmAt pAnIyaM pItaM tena yo rikto'BUt sa ucyate nizpIta iti
'GftaM nizpibati' (tE0 zaM0 23115) nizpibati niHSezeRa pibati
'uBe vA eza ete savane vipibati' (E0 brA0 329) vipibati viSezeRa pibati
'vi pibaDvaM kuSikAH somyaM maDu' (f0 35310) he kuSikAH yUyameke tAsu tAsu velAsu somyaM maDu pibatetyAha
'adByaH kzIraM vyapibat' (vA0 saM0 1973) vyapibat viSezeRa kaRehatyApibat
'nApibeyaM balAdvakzo BittvA cedruDiraM yuDi' (BA0 saBA0 6853) Apibeyam=niHSezeRa pibeyam kaRehatya pibAmItyarTaH
'tato syA ApapO vaktraM padmaM maDukaro yaTA' (hari0 8746) ukto'rTaH
'zaqAnanApItapayoDarAsu' (raGu0 1422) ApItA niHSezeRa pItA
'ApItO yuzmadviDEH putrEH …payoDarO' (harza0 5) ukto'rTaH
'tA rAGavaM dfzwiBirApibantyaH' (raGu0 712) satfzRamAlokayantya iti tAtparyArTaH
'upEti savitA hyastaM rasamApIya pArTivam' (BA0 SAM0 5828) rasamAkfzyetyarTaH
'ApAne pAnakalitA dEvenABipracoditAH' (BA0 Adi0 2355) ApAnaM pAnaSAlA amarastvApAnaM pAnagozWiketi paWati
'ganDarvApsaraso Badre mAmApAnagataM sadA upatizWanti' (BA0 vana0 28113) ukto'rTaH
'ApibeyaM samudraM ca' (rA0 3493) niHSezaM pibeyamityarTaH
'sA ninAya tamudyAnamApAnAya surANganA' (kaTA0 73152) ApAnaM surApAnam
'Apitve naH prapitve tUyamAgahi' (f0 843)
'Apitve ApAnakAla iti durga'
'ftaM piparttyanftaM ni pAti' (aTarva0 91023) kadA ca na prayucCasyuBe nipAsi janmanI (lO0 gf0 87 ityatra devapAlena BAzye samudDfto mantraH) nipAsi nitarAM rakzasi
'ftasya padaM kavayo ni pAnti' (f0 1052) ukto'rTaH
'sA no amAso araRe ni pAtu' (f0 106316)
'tfzRArtESca nipIyate vanamfgEruzRaM payaH sArasam' (mfcCa0 811) nipIyate nirDIyate
'(tAM) nipIyamAnalAvaRyAM lolErdevAsurekzaREH' (kaTA0 50132) ukto'rTaH
'dantacCadaM priyatamena nipItasAram' (ftu0 413) nipItaScUzitaH sAro'sya taM taTABUtam
'nipAnaM sarvaBUtAnAM BUtvA tvaM pAvanaM mahat' (BA0 SAM0 1817) nipAnamAhAvaH
'gAhantAM mahizA nipAnasalilaM SfNgErmuhustAqitam' (SA0 26) nipAnaM palvalam
'jahyuH svarAqiva nipAnaKanitramindraH' (BA0 pu0 2748) iha nipAnenodapAnaH kUpa uktaH kaviriti tatrArTe'satImapi Saktimutprekzate
'ime SaMsaM vanuzyato nipAnti' (tE0 brA0 2856) nipAnti nitarAM pAnti rakzanti
'SAstraprataptA nipibanti cAnye' (vAmanapu0 1043) nipibanti nitarAM pibanti nipatantIti pAWAntaram
'nipAne mahizaM rAtrO' (rA0 26321) nIcEravatIrya pIyate'treti nadyavatArasTalam tIrTamiti yAvat
'sA madyaM tenAtipAyitA' (kaTA0 39207) atipAyitA sAtiSayaM pAnaM kAritA
'utpibante vA imAni dikzu nAzwrarakzAMsi' (Sa0 brA0 5247) niHSezaM pibantItyarTaH
'pratipAnahradAnpUrRAn' (rA0 29178) BuktajaraRArTaM yatpIyate tat pratipAnam
'yavAgUM pratipItasya SoRitaM mokzayed Bizak' (suSruta0 sUtra0 1425) pratirAnantarya iti qallanaH mAtrArTa ityanye yavAgUpAnAnantaram ityarTaH alpAyA yavAgvAH pAne satIti vArTaH
'tAnvE tvamuBayataH pari pibeti tAn prajApatiruBayataH paryapibat' (E0 brA0 330) fBURAmuBayoH pArSvayoH sTitvA pUrvaM paScAcca pibetyarTaH
'rakzAMsi nUnaM paripItavanti viBidya SUnye ruDirASanAni' (rA0 36310) sAkalyena pItavantItyarTaH
'mattadvirePaparipItamaDuprasekam' (kovidAram) (ftu0 36) ukto'rTaH
'yadyupapAyyamAno na pibet' (Apa0 SrO0 91811) upapAyyamAna upanIya pAyyamAnaH apAM samIpe nItaH sanpAnaM kAryamARaH

prayoga.literature_text: na Kalu maDu vinA tvayA pibati
aBigamya taTA sarve pibanti maDu vAnarAH
na pibeyaM na KAdeyaM pratyahaM mama Bojanam
